mainEntity.name: Which companies must get a secretarial audit?

acceptedAnswer.text: Virtual Auditor provides expert advisory on this through our FCA + ACS + CFE + IBBI Registered Valuer practice. Contact us at +91-99622 60333 or visit virtualauditor.in for detailed guidance specific to your situation.

Form MR-3 is a professional service/compliance requirement under Indian regulatory framework. Virtual Auditor provides expert advisory on this through our team led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI Registered Valuer). Contact us at +91-99622 60333 for a detailed consultation.

mainEntity.name: Who can conduct a secretarial audit — CA or CS?

acceptedAnswer.text: This service can be provided by qualified professionals with relevant credentials. At Virtual Auditor, CA V. Viswanathan holds FCA (ICAI), ACS (ICSI), CFE (ACFE USA), and IBBI Registered Valuer (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333) certifications — covering the full spectrum of regulatory requirements. Our practice operates from Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai.

mainEntity.name: What is the penalty for not filing secretarial audit report?

acceptedAnswer.text: the penalty for not filing secretarial audit report is a professional service/compliance requirement under Indian regulatory framework. Virtual Auditor provides expert advisory on this through our team led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI Registered Valuer). Contact us at +91-99622 60333 for a detailed consultation.

mainEntity.name: What period does the secretarial audit cover?

acceptedAnswer.text: Virtual Auditor provides expert advisory on this through our FCA + ACS + CFE + IBBI Registered Valuer practice. Contact us at +91-99622 60333 or visit virtualauditor.in for detailed guidance specific to your situation.
